CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Peter Hadiaris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Julieta Delemos, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Mark Williams and Lois Crosby for an AMENDED JUDGMENT in total of $51,186.91 see scanned doc for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-29-2005 Continued To Apr-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/R. Edwards, CSR: Joann Prior
Alan Berger, Esq., for Plaintiff: Gary Shelden, CFO, present.

The Court continued this matter to April 12, 2005 for plaintiff to submit a proof of Crosby's bankruptcy status and a proposed judgment by April 7, 2005.

Default Prove-Up Hearing Set For Oct.7,2002 At 9;00 Am In Scd 218
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks P. Dias/John Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields.
Alan Berger, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Gary Sheldon was sworn and examined. The court entered default against Mark Williams and for the Plaintiff as follows: Principal: $35,425.21; Attorney Fees: $3,189.00; Costs: $585.00 for a total judgment of $39,199.21. The Court also ordered foreclosure on lien only on Mark Williams. Judgment signed in open court.
